implementationSummary: Extended Phase 2.6 Demo Decision shells for Workflow 5 (process order) and promotion branches 7a/7c/7b (create/update/delete activity): isolated per-workflow review stages and FBS timelines, FBT intake scaffold-only for fulfillment and promotion, explicit Unresolved capability states, shared registry wiring, Approve enabled for process_order_5 and promotion tool keys, and one review→approve→In Progress integration test per workflow/branch.
assumptions: Shared RecommendationReview and In Progress shells remain workflow-agnostic once stages/timelines exist
FBT intake process_order_5b and promotion FBT paths stay scaffold-only with no fabricated executor steps
Workflows 6 and 8–9 remain Approve-disabled until later slices
risks: Demo timelines are mock screen-states; real TikTok fulfillment/promotion waits remain Phase 3
update/delete promotion branches require known activity_id — search-by-keyword remains unsupported per design
